Description: An ISO metric screw thread with the letter M then the value of the maximum thread diameter D, and the pitch P, both in millimetres and separated by an x (e.g. M6x1.25). If it is the standard 'coarse' pitch listed in ISO 261 or ISO 262, it can be omitted (e.g. M6). When selling a part, include the thread diameter, Thread Depth (if applicable), and other dimensions like the extra depth from the part itself.
Attribution: Inductiveload, Public domain, via Wikimedia Commons

Description: Three threaded holes in a equilateral triangle formation from the center of each thread. Variables: Thread diameter, Thread Depth, Distance from the center of each thread, other dimensions like the extra depth from the part itself.
Default: M6 screw, screw depth (specify), 10cm distance from the center of each thread
Variables: Distance from the center of each thread

Description: Four threaded holes in a square formation from the center of each thread. Variables: Thread diameter, Thread Depth, Distance from the center of each thread, other dimensions like the extra depth from the part itself.
Default: M6 screw, screw depth (specify), 10cm distance from the center of each thread
Variables: Distance from the center of each thread

Description: Friction fit join between circular parts. E.g. vacuum nozzle attachments. Variables:Hose outer diameter, Hose depth, Distance from the center of each thread, other dimensions like the extra depth from the part itself.
Variables: Distance from the center of each thread
